plugins.name: Top.gg Voter Role
plugins.short_description: Automatically give Discord roles to Top.gg voters with auto-expiry.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns a Discord role to users who upvote your bot on Top.gg. Roles are granted instantly after voting and automatically removed when the vote expires. Integrates with RoleLogic's role link system to reward and recognize community members who support your Discord bot on Top.gg.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Genshin Player Role
plugins.short_description: Give Discord roles based on Genshin Impact player stats and progress.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on Genshin Impact player stats. Set up custom conditions using Adventure Rank, World Level, Spiral Abyss progress, or other in-game data to reward players and highlight achievements. Roles stay synced as players progress. View a list of verified Genshin Impact players in your Discord server to track linked accounts and their stats.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: YouTube Subscriber Role
plugins.short_description: Give Discord roles to YouTube channel subscribers automatically.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles to members subscribed to a YouTube channel. Members verify through Google OAuth, and the plugin periodically checks subscription status via the YouTube Data API. Roles are dynamically assigned to active subscribers and removed when they unsubscribe, keeping your Discord server roles synced with your YouTube audience.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: GitHub Contributor Role
plugins.short_description: Give Discord roles based on GitHub contributions to any repository.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on GitHub contribution activity. Configure conditions using commits, pull requests, merged PRs, or issues on any public repository. Members link their Discord and GitHub accounts, and the plugin continuously tracks their contributions to keep roles synced with real activity.
plugins.author: RoleLogic
